title: RACI / DACI Governance Input
description: Required and optional inputs for executing the RACI / DACI Governance skill.

problem_statement.description: The business problem or diagnostic question to be analyzed.

company_context.description: Company background, industry, size, and relevant business context.

list_decisions_process.description: List of decisions or process activities requiring role assignment — the rows of the matrix

roster_stakeholder_roles.description: Roster of stakeholder roles to appear on the matrix — the columns; individual names are included but roles are the primary unit of mapping

existing_escalation_paths.description: Existing escalation paths and authority limits relevant to the decisions being mapped

decision_frequency_urgency.description: Decision frequency and urgency classification to identify which decisions most need governance clarity

existing_process_documentation.description: Existing process documentation or swim lane maps to anchor the activity list

raci_daci_matrices.description: RACI or DACI matrices from comparable functions or organizations as reference benchmarks
